upgrades.changelog:
* Includes firmware versions: 1.0, 1.20, 1.30.
* Fixed a bug that caused the sensor to report negative lux values under certain conditions on specific platforms.
* Fixed a bug where setting parameter 16 to any value other than the default prevented the LED indicator from flashing on motion.
* Updated parameter names and short descriptions in the Configuration Command Class for improved clarity and consistency.
* Updated SDK from 7.19.3 to 7.24.2.

* Includes firmware versions: 1.0, 1.20, 1.30.
* Fixed a bug that caused the sensor to report negative lux values under certain conditions on specific platforms.
* Fixed a bug where setting parameter 16 to any value other than the default prevented the LED indicator from flashing on motion.
* Updated parameter names and short descriptions in the Configuration Command Class for improved clarity and consistency.
* Updated SDK from 7.19.3 to 7.24.2.
* Added Long Range support for Europe.
